journal_entry.description: Acquisition of 10% equity investment in Ford common shares at FVOCI
journal_entry.rationale: Under IFRS 9, equity investments designated at FVOCI are initially measured at fair value plus transaction costs. The $3,000,000 purchase price and $100,000 transaction fee are both capitalized to the investment account (asset increase). Cash decreases by the total amount paid ($3,100,000). No tax applies to financial instrument purchases.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Under IFRS 9, equity investments designated at FVOCI are initially recognized at fair value plus directly attributable transaction costs. The $3M purchase price and $100K fee are both capitalized to the investment asset account. One asset increases (investment), one asset decreases (cash).
